title: Better Brushes
description: Paint, brush your pets, remove moss, farm string, and more with brushes.
body:
Paint, brush your pets, farm string, remove moss, and more with brushes.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/C87W01366kI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Paintbrush
Use a brush and dye to craft a paint brush.

Brush a colorful block to change its color.

![Paintbrush](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/231b94ca2c8c7d8c407d58a12cbeae7a5ff12996.jpeg)

## Cleaning Dye
Use the brush on a cauldron to remove paint from the brush, and wet the brush.

Brush a colorful block with a wet brush to remove the dye.

![Cleaning Dye](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82099ba16b0acae34789015158111c86707d4fb2.jpeg)

## Taming Animals
Brush equestrian mobs, such as horses and donkeys, to increase their chance of being tamed.

![Taming Animals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc2e560b426665510dbbe22d014e8dd3032e4f17.jpeg)

## Brushing Pets
Brush tamed animals to give them a small amount of regeneration.

![Brushing Pets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5864a34db435858fb7a01de284a993c9d665cfc.jpeg)

## Sweep Mossy Blocks
Brush a mossy block to remove the moss.

There is a chance it will drop a moss carpet or vines.

![Sweep Mossy Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9205eb17f14a018a890c9ea248b0eed755767d58.jpeg)

## Brush Sheep
Brush a sheep to get string.

This can be a source of farm-able string in peaceful mode.

![Brush Sheep](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/584153a996e9020ab1307b3630d672e6490cb54d.jpeg)

## Remove Silverfish
Brush an infested block and the silverfish will pop out without breaking the block.

![Remove Silverfish](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83021b1bd98082785cf300fd69ad2d16f4660581.jpeg)
